items.title: 'Turning football into rubble': Chaos reigns in ACL after VAR intervenes over substitution
items.summary: In what is possibly a world-first, VAR overturned a goal over a substitution -- and it led to a controversial Asian Champions League semifinal exit.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Shohei Ohtani On-Base Streak Tracker: Ohtani Ties Alex Rodriguez With 53-Straight
items.summary: Shohei Ohtani is moving up MLB's all-time list of on-base streaks. Here's how close he is to making history.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Finch to Axar: 'You're not willing to stand up at the moment'
items.summary: DC captain avoided a match-up against the left-handed Abhishek Sharma, prompting criticism
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
